channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla vs. BYD: Only 1 Can Make You Rich Over the Next 5 Years
item.description: BYD dethroned Tesla as the world's top EV seller in 2025, but Tesla has plans that expand beyond car manufacturing.

item.title: Tesla Explores Cheaper EV to Broaden Market Reach
item.description: New compact SUV could signal a shift back toward mass-market vehicles.

item.title: Another Tesla Cybercab V_001 spotting
item.description: submitted by /u/TDPD [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Is Reportedly Working On A New, Smaller Electric Car After All
item.description: Hmm … curiouser and curiouser. In a saga that has gone on for several years, Tesla was not going to develop an electric car smaller and cheaper than the Model 3, and then it was, and then it wasn’t, and then it might be, and then it wasn’t, and now ... [continued] The post Tesla Is Reportedly W...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) retail sales crash 16% in China in Q1 despite ‘rising’ wholesale numbers
item.description: Tesla’s actual retail sales in China crashed 16% year-over-year in Q1 2026, with March alone plunging 24% — despite several media outlets reporting that Tesla’s China numbers were up for the quarter. The discrepancy comes down to the difference between wholesale and retail numbers. Tesla’s wholes...

item.title: Tesla's cheaper EV plans might be back on, with an SUV on the way
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) will reportedly continue developing cheaper electric vehicle (EV) models, including an EV SUV, according to Reuters. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian goes over the details.

item.title: Intel Stock Hits 5-Year High on Musk Deal - Is It Too Late to Buy?
item.description: Intel surges 58.9% YTD as Musk's Terafab tie-up and fab buyback fuel optimism around its AI chip ambitions and long-term growth outlook.

item.title: Kia’s mid-size electric SUV spotted with US plates [Images]
item.description: The EV5 is about the size of Kia’s best-selling Sportage SUV and the Tesla Model Y. After opening orders in Europe and Canada, Kia’s mid-size electric SUV was spotted testing in the US again, but this one is different. more…

item.title: Tesla: Waiting For 'Amazing Abundance' To Amaze
Elon Musk Gives Intel The AI Foundry Stamp It's Been Chasing
item.description: Intel Corp. just got the kind of public endorsement its foundry ambitions have been missing — from Elon Musk. Shares of Intel gained on Tuesday after it joined the Terafab project alongside SpaceX, xAI and Tesla Inc..

item.title: Tesla Just Delivered Terrible News for Its Investors
item.description: Wall Street is increasingly worried about Tesla's electric vehicle business.

item.title: Tesla: Elon Musk Is Becoming A Burden
Tesla Changing Course? Reportedly Working On Cheap Compact SUV
item.description: Tesla is reviving plans for a cheap electric vehicle, with Reuters reporting plans to make a compact SUV. Tesla stock was little changed.

item.title: Tesla's China Sales Slump As Stock Nears Two-Month Losing Streak
item.description: Tesla's March retail sales in China fell compared to the same time last year, even though exports from its Shanghai gigafactory surged. The stock is closing in on its eighth consecutive down week.

item.title: Musk says Tesla FSD v15 will ‘far exceed’ human safety — he said the same about v12 and v14
item.description: Elon Musk is once again promising that the next version of Tesla’s “Full Self-Driving” software will “far exceed human levels of safety.” This time it’s V15. The problem is that he made virtually identical claims about Version 12 in 2023 and V14 in 2025 — and neither came close to delivering. Mus...

item.title: CRWV, CVX, LLY, TSLA Lead Thursday Watchlist
item.description: Key catalysts put 4 stocks in focus

item.title: Tesla issues wake up call to Full Self-Driving hackers and cheats
item.description: Tesla is cracking down on hackers who have figured out a way to utilize third-party programs to activate Full Self-Driving (FSD) in their vehicles — despite the suite not being approved for use in their country. Tesla has launched a sweeping enforcement campaign against owners using third-party h...

item.title: Tesla stock is sliding, but Cathie Wood just bet $14 million that everyone else is wrong
item.description: Ark Invest founder Cathie Wood has a long track record of buying Tesla during downturns.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Is Down 10.0% After Compact SUV Plans And Terafab Deal Question Its Next Chapter
item.description: Tesla recently reported that in the first quarter of 2026 it produced over 408,000 vehicles, delivered 358,023, and deployed 8.8 GWh of energy storage, while separate reports indicate it is working on an all-new, smaller and cheaper compact electric SUV initially focused on China with potential e...

item.title: Tesla Is Designing a Smaller, Lower-Cost SUV. The Move Could Signal a Major Strategy Shift.
item.description: Tesla has started designing a smaller, lower-cost SUV, after shelving earlier plans for an affordable model, Reuters reported.

item.title: Tesla developing small, affordable SUV, report claims
item.description: Tesla is developing a small, affordable SUV, a new report claims, speculating that the automaker is planning to add yet another vehicle to its lineup at a price point similar to the Model 3 and Model Y, but smaller and more compact. But it does not make a whole lot of sense, especially considerin...

item.title: A Strong Sell Still: Tesla's Decline Appears Far From Over
Tesla Is Developing A Chevy Bolt-Sized Affordable Compact Electric SUV: Report
item.description: The automaker’s affordable EV plans are reportedly back on track.

item.title: Tesla Stock Slips Again -- Report Points to New Low-Cost SUV Plan
item.description: Tesla New SUV Plan Raises Questions on Strategy Shift

item.title: Why I Just Increased My Tesla Position
Jim Cramer Notes That the SpaceX IPO Could Reduce Investor Interest In Tesla
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is among Jim Cramer’s stock calls as he discussed the impact of the bond market. Cramer highlighted the company’s woes, as he remarked: Are shareholders finally reacting to Tesla’s deteriorating fundamentals, or is something else going on?

item.title: Tesla cracks down on FSD hacking devices, remotely shuts down access
item.description: Tesla is hitting back at a growing gray market of unauthorized devices that unlock Full Self-Driving (FSD) in regions where the software hasn’t been approved. The automaker has been remotely disabling FSD on affected vehicles — permanently revoking access without warning. Reports are surfacing fr...

item.title: Nvidia And Tesla Grab Headlines, But This Stock Is Grabbing Gains
item.description: While tech titans like Nvidia, Tesla and Palantir get all the buzz, Benchmark Electronics is quietly dwarfing their gains.

item.title: Jim Cramer Reveals What Everyone Missed About Tesla’s (TSLA) Stock
item.description: We just covered Jim Cramer Discussed The Iran Ceasefire & Commented On These 19 Stocks. Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer.

item.title: Tesla vs. Ford: Don’t Buy Either Stock Until You Read This
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and Ford (NYSE:F) closed 2025 with results that crystallize their diverging futures. Tesla reported fourth quarter earnings leaning into autonomy and AI while Ford showed a massive EV write-down but its commercial truck business posted its best numbers in years. Robotaxis and ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Falls. Why the Market Doesn’t Care About New Car Report.
item.description: Tesla is considering an all-new electric vehicle, Reuters reported on Thursday. Tesla didn’t respond to a request for comment. Tesla stock was up down 1.4% at $338.50 in early trading Thursday, while the and were down 0.1%.

item.title: Tesla CEO Elon Musk says next FSD release is the one we’ve been waiting for
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk teased the capabilities of a future Full Self-Driving release, but it seems like we are getting what Yogi Berra once called “Déjà vu all over again.” On Thursday, Musk teased the capabilities and next steps for Tesla’s Full Self-Driving software, focusing squarely on the incre...

item.title: Cathie Wood Pours $28 Million in Tesla Stock After Brutal Sell-Off
item.description: Cathie Wood's Tesla Bet Swells to $27.8 Million This Week as Dip Deepens

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) reportedly developing new smaller, cheaper EV after killing Model 2
item.description: Tesla is reportedly developing an all-new smaller, cheaper electric SUV — two years after CEO Elon Musk killed the company’s affordable EV program and called building cars for human drivers “pointless.” Reuters reports that four people familiar with the matter say the new compact SUV would be pro...

item.title: Intel Terafab Rally Draws Cautious View
item.description: Intel was rated Hold by Seeking Alpha analysts after its Terafab-related rally.

item.title: What Do SpaceX, xAI, And X Have In Common? Is It Tesla?
item.description: Billionaire Elon Musk surprised lots of people with his quick February merger between SpaceX and his artificial intelligence lab xAI. He is now in the process of adding up to $75 billion to the current estimated $2 trillion-plus SpaceX valuation, and, with the company’s initial public offering (I...

item.title: Market Chatter: Tesla Developing Smaller, Cheaper Electric SUV
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is developing a new compact, lower-cost electric SUV as it looks to expand its lineup b

item.title: Is Rivian The Next Tesla?
item.description: Rivian has lost significant value since it went public.

item.title: Exclusive-Tesla is developing a new smaller, cheaper EV, sources say
item.description: By Reuters staff April 9 (Reuters) - Tesla is developing an all-new smaller, cheaper electric SUV, four people familiar with the matter told Reuters.

item.title: From flying cars to self-driving cars: CEOs weigh in
item.description: Archer Aviation Founder and CEO Adam Goldstein joins Opening Bid Unfiltered with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to chat about the future of flying cars. Goldstein explains why he is so passionate about EVTOLs (Electric Vertical Takeoff and Landing) and key milestones for Archer Aviati...

item.title: Tesla Supercharger for Business exposes jaw-dropping ROI gap between best and worst locations
item.description: Tesla has launched an online calculator for its Supercharger for Business program, giving property owners their first transparent look at what it really costs to install Superchargers on site and what kind of return they can expect. The program itself launched in September 2025, allowing business...

item.title: Tesla Stock's Rough Year Continues. Time to Buy the Stock?
item.description: The electric vehicle maker's latest delivery miss and a sudden contraction in its energy segment highlight the growing risk in its demanding valuation.

item.title: Tesla’s Terafab AI Chip Push Meets Easing Autonomy Regulatory Pressure
item.description: Intel has joined Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI in a new Terafab AI chip manufacturing initiative focused on domestic production for advanced computing. The Terafab facility is intended to support AI, robotics, and autonomous vehicle workloads across the partnered companies. The US Nation...

item.title: Teradyne (TER) Soars to All-Time High — Time to Book Profits?
item.description: Teradyne Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the 10 Stocks That Would Have Boosted Your Portfolios by Double Digits. Teradyne surged to a fresh all-time high on Wednesday, as optimistic sentiment over Intel Corp.’s involvement in Elon Musk’s Terafab project spilled over into its stock.

item.title: Intel Corp. (INTC) Joins Elon Musk in Terafab Hopes, Rockets 11.4%
item.description: Intel Corp. (NASDAQ:INTC) is one of the 10 Stocks That Would Have Boosted Your Portfolios by Double Digits. Intel Corp.

item.title: Walmart quietly tackling Tesla and EV owners' biggest problem
item.description: As the driver of an electric vehicle, one clear thing dampens my enjoyment of my BMW i3. It's not the lack of loud engine noises, or the fact that my car essentially operates in silence. It's always feeling insecure about finding a place to charge.

item.title: Tesla FSD vs Enhanced Autopilot in Europe 2026: Which Should You Order?
item.description: Feature-by-feature comparison of Tesla FSD Supervised vs Enhanced Autopilot in Europe. Pricing, capabilities, and which option European buyers should choose in 2026.

item.title: BMW and Audi could never compete with Tesla or China EV Brands…
item.description: BMW and Audi EVs are too expensive and lag in technology and R&D. Tesla and Chinese brands like BYD, NIO, Xpeng, And Li Auto are beating them on price, features, software, and sales. BMW and Audi will never be a competitor in the EV space.

item.title: Elon Musk drops a bomb regarding Tesla Model S, X inventory
item.description: Elon Musk just dropped a bomb regarding Tesla Model S and X inventory, and as the company is phasing out the flagship vehicles, it sounds like the time to purchase one brand new is almost over. Musk confirmed on Wednesday that there are “only a few hundred Tesla Model S & X cars left in inventory...

item.title: Tesla’s Price-to-Earnings Ratio Is Nuts
item.description: A couple of weeks ago, when I wrote about Tesla’s stock price dropping 20% in 6 months, a reader commented: “Tesla down 20% in the past 6 months and the P/E is still over 300. That is not sustainable.” Another commenter showed in more detail why this was crazy: Price ... [continued] The post Te...
